meta.title: Cashu for WooCommerce
meta.description: Try the plugin in a disposable WordPress + WooCommerce sandbox.
meta.author: robwoodgate

steps.code: <?php require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php'; if ( ! function_exists( 'wc_get_products' ) ) { return; } if ( wc_get_products( array( 'limit' => 1 ) ) ) { return; } $products = array( array( 'Sample T-Shirt', '19.99', 'A cotton tee. Try paying via Cashu at checkout.' ), array( 'Sample Coffee Mug', '9.99', 'Holds coffee. Pay with ecash.' ), array( 'Sample Sticker Pack', '4.99', 'Vinyl stickers. Lowest-value item to test small amounts.' ), array( 'Sample Hoodie', '49.99', 'Cozy hoodie. Larger amount to test melt fee handling.' ) ); foreach ( $products as $p ) { $product = new WC_Product_Simple(); $product->set_name( $p[0] ); $product->set_regular_price( $p[1] ); $product->set_description( $p[2] ); $product->set_short_description( $p[2] ); $product->set_status( 'publish' ); $product->set_catalog_visibility( 'visible' ); $product->save(); }
